name: Godspeed Approval Boundaries
foundryIqStatus: dev/test Foundry proof captured with knowledge grounding and OpenAPI tool-backed mission creation
blockedWithoutSeparateApproval: create Azure or Microsoft Foundry resources
connect production Defender, Sentinel, Intune, ticketing or endpoint-response tools
ingest customer or production security data
run production scans, patching, isolation, account resets or external communications
manualProofRequired: knowledge source upload or link screenshot
grounded response screenshot with approval gates
